subcodes.first_line: O My leaf and My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory! Praise be to God that thou hast attained unto the effulgent rays of the Luminary of Manifestation, the Speaker of Sinai [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و یا امتی علیک بهائی لله الحمد از تجلیات انوار نیر ظهور مکلم طور فائز
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
